Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to occur after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to the average resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants where re-submission occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after the last approval step in the process variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be followed by a new submission, compared to the time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and its subsequent resubmission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled versus cases that terminate without payment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Average time from Request Payment to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in anomalous variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is performed in variants that include a prior Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING when occurring after Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER versus after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the next occurrence of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in rejected-and-resubmitted process instances
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE occurs
